title: Team thinking, visualized by Claude
summary: Anthropic's Claude AI was used by the Atlassian Williams F1 Team to visualize cognitive patterns and decision-making processes of drivers and pit crew during races. The visualizations, called Pattern of Thought, were rendered as designs on team helmets, race suits, and garage elements, debuting at Monaco.
